channel.title: Manzill — Jaipur Breaking News
channel.description: Live breaking news from Jaipur, Rajasthan — the top developing story of the day with running updates.

item.title: Now tracking as Jaipur's top developing story: Rajasthan: Police arrest accused in Alwar petrol pump shooting case; probe reveals planned attack.
item.description: Now tracking as Jaipur's top developing story: Rajasthan: Police arrest accused in Alwar petrol pump shooting case; probe reveals planned attack.
